heading: Search Across Multiple Fields
body:
The following query searches the `title` and `plot` fields of the
`movies` collection for words that begin with the character string `inter`
using the [compound](compound-ref) operator.

Atlas UI

MongoDB Shell

Compass

C#

Go

Java (Sync)

Kotlin (Coroutine)

Node.js

Python

> **Note:** 
>
> Your Results May Vary
>
> MongoDB Search returns different results depending on the tokenization
> strategy configured in the index definition for the
> [tokenization](bson-data-types-autocomplete) type. To learn
> more, see [tokenization](bson-data-types-autocomplete).

the `title` or `plot` field. MongoDB Search returns results that begin with the specified
query string because MongoDB Search matches the query term to the tokens that it creates
for the `title` and `plot` fields starting at the left side the word.
